blended.narrative: Aspen Snowmass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,318 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
